name: doc-set-wrong-doc-uploaded
rationale: Broker uploads document with mismatched filename + content. E.g., attaches 'MortgageStatement_Webb.pdf' but the PDF content is actually a loan application form (filename routes to mortgage_statement classification per deals.js classifyDocument, but content text doesn't match). Layer 3: does Vienna detect filename-vs-content mismatch + escalate, or does filename-classification dominate? Product-design item.
notes: Single-event sequence. Fixture deliberately constructs filename-content mismatch.
